summary: Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to destroy a Russian TOS-1A MLRS after it was first damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, and also struck two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade evacuated a wounded comrade under fire, while the 35th Marine Brigade reported ongoing operations against Russian UAVs. Russian troops suffered FPV strikes after one attempted to surrender then flee, and another was killed after his AK jammed during a self-inflicted injury attempt. Ukrainian EW interference was demonstrated in a meme format, and soldiers from the 36th Marine Brigade survived an FPV attack after detecting the drone with a handheld detector.
